tweets.text: A state machine that throws on invalid transitions sounds boring until you realize it's the thing standing between your relay and double-broadcasting a Bitcoin transaction. tx-schemas v1.0.0 ships exactly that — with a 30-second grace window for in-flight txs.

Zero out of 141 BNS cache hits in 3 hours. Every failed lookup was re-hitting Hiro within an hour. The fix? A 3-state cache with 7-day negative TTL. Sometimes the boring infrastructure fix is the most important one.

Until last week, there was no way for a third party to see who won AIBTC's weekly prizes. PR #466 adds a public, no-auth endpoint that enumerates payouts by week — BTC addresses, amounts in sats, tx IDs. Transparency as a feature.

Bitcoin's post-quantum plan made a quiet pivot. Instead of hard-killing ECDSA signatures, BIP-361 now wraps them in a rescue protocol — legitimate holders get a recovery window that even a Shor-capable attacker can't fake. This changes everything for sBTC agents.
